message:
fix(handoff): sort mail threads by recency and normalize thread IDs

- Sort fetched inbox messages newest-first before building the thread
  list so the first entry for each thread is always the most recent
  message (previously order was server-dependent)
- Extract normalizeThreadID() to handle nil and whitespace-only thread
  IDs consistently
- Use case-insensitive comparison for urgency markers
- Add test: TestFetchAgentMailThreadsPrefersNewestUniqueThreadEntry
  using an httptest server to verify dedup picks the newest entry and
  preserves the urgency marker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
